name: Cube Merge Game
description: Cube Merge Game is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you create bigger numbers by merging cubes! Drop numbered blocks and combine matching cubes to reach higher values. Enjoy the classic 2048-style gameplay with a fresh and exciting twist. Keep merging cubes, plan your moves wisely, and challenge yourself to achieve the highest score. Simple to play but hard to master, this game is perfect for all puzzle lovers!
instructions: Tap or drag to drop numbered cubes Merge cubes with the same numbers Keep combining to create bigger numbers Plan your moves carefully to avoid running out of space
